scripts.test:unit: bun test src/tests/logger.test.ts src/tests/front_month_resolver.test.ts src/tests/refresh_subscriptions.test.ts src/tests/recovery_service.test.ts src/tests/recovery_store.test.ts src/tests/history_client.test.ts src/tests/rest_client.test.ts src/tests/schedule_builder.test.ts src/tests/contract_provider.test.ts src/tests/contracts_calendar.test.ts src/tests/market_session.test.ts src/tests/front_month_job.unit.test.ts src/tests/snapshot_job.test.ts src/tests/ws_client.test.ts src/tests/flow_store.test.ts src/tests/massive_utils.test.ts src/tests/massive_snapshots.test.ts src/tests/clear_daily.test.ts src/tests/tickers.test.ts src/tests/futures_universe.test.ts

scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage src/tests/logger.test.ts src/tests/front_month_resolver.test.ts src/tests/refresh_subscriptions.test.ts src/tests/recovery_service.test.ts src/tests/recovery_store.test.ts src/tests/history_client.test.ts src/tests/rest_client.test.ts src/tests/schedule_builder.test.ts src/tests/contract_provider.test.ts src/tests/contracts_calendar.test.ts src/tests/market_session.test.ts src/tests/front_month_job.unit.test.ts src/tests/snapshot_job.test.ts src/tests/ws_client.test.ts src/tests/flow_store.test.ts src/tests/massive_utils.test.ts src/tests/massive_snapshots.test.ts src/tests/clear_daily.test.ts src/tests/tickers.test.ts src/tests/futures_universe.test.ts
